steps.title: Substitute x = 48 into the function
steps.content: We're given $j(x) = \frac{x}{8}$ and need to find $j(48)$. To evaluate the function at $x = 48$, we substitute this value into the definition.

steps.title: Simplify to find the answer
steps.content: $$j(48) = \frac{48}{8} = 6$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
